name: 24" x 36" Infinity Mantle Wall Mirror Black - Threshold™: Rust-Resistant, Rounded Top, Wall Mount
description:
Enhance the appearance of your space with this Infinity Mantle Mirror from Threshold™. This mantle mirror features a rectangular shape with a rounded top for a clean, modern look. Set in a rust-resistant black metal frame, it will blend well with just about any existing decor. Hang it above a console table, fireplace mantel or dresser for versatile, functional and elegant display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
